import torch

def op(x):
    y = torch.clamp(x, -3.0, 3.0)
    return y * y + 0.25 * y

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, residual):
    return F.gelu(x) + residual * 0.5

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, bias):
    y = x + bias
    return F.silu(y) * y

import torch, math

def op(q, k, v):
    seq = q.shape[-2]
    causal = torch.tril(torch.ones((seq, seq), device=q.device, dtype=torch.bool))
    scores = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(-2, -1)).float() / math.sqrt(q.shape[-1])
    scores = scores.masked_fill(~causal, float("-inf"))
    probs = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1).to(q.dtype)
    return torch.matmul(probs, v)

import torch

def op(x):
    values = x.max(dim=-1, keepdim=True).values
    return x - values

import torch

def op(x):
    mean = x.mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True)
    return x - mean

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, y):
    return x + y

import torch, math
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(q, k, v):
    sm_scale = 1.0 / math.sqrt(q.shape[-1])
    seq_len = q.shape[2]
    M = torch.tril(torch.ones((seq_len, seq_len), device=q.device))
    p = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(2, 3)) * sm_scale
    p = p.masked_fill(M == 0, float("-inf"))
    p = torch.softmax(p.float(), dim=-1).to(q.dtype)
    return torch.matmul(p, v)

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, weight, target_logits):
    logits = F.linear(x, weight)
    p = F.softmax(logits, dim=-1)
    q = F.softmax(target_logits, dim=-1)
    m = 0.5 * (p + q)
    return 0.5 * (F.kl_div(m.log(), p, reduction="batchmean") + F.kl_div(m.log(), q, reduction="batchmean"))

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(p_logits, q_logits):
    p = F.softmax(p_logits, dim=-1)
    q = F.softmax(q_logits, dim=-1)
    m = 0.5 * (p + q)
    return 0.5 * (F.kl_div(m.log(), p, reduction="batchmean") + F.kl_div(m.log(), q, reduction="batchmean"))

import torch

def op(x, residual, weight):
    hidden = x + residual
    variance = hidden.float().pow(2).mean(-1, keepdim=True)
    hidden = hidden * torch.rsqrt(variance + 1e-6)
    return weight * hidden

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, w1, b1, w2, b2, w3, b3):
    y1 = F.linear(x, w1, b1)
    y2 = F.linear(x, w2, b2)
    y3 = F.linear(x, w3, b3)
    return y1 + y2 + y3

    y3 = F.linear(x, w3, b3)

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, norm_weight, norm_bias):
    x = F.layer_norm(x, (768,), norm_weight, norm_bias, eps=1e-05)
    return x

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, conv_weight, bn_weight, bn_bias, running_mean, running_var):
    x = F.conv2d(x, conv_weight, None, stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1), dilation=(1, 1), groups=1)
    x = F.batch_norm(x, running_mean, running_var, bn_weight, bn_bias, training=False, momentum=0.1, eps=1e-05)
    return x

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, conv_weight, bn_weight, bn_bias, running_mean, running_var):
    x = F.conv2d(x, conv_weight, None, stride=(1, 1), padding=(0, 0), dilation=(1, 1), groups=1)
    x = F.batch_norm(x, running_mean, running_var, bn_weight, bn_bias, training=False, momentum=0.1, eps=1e-05)
    return x

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def op(x, conv_weight, bn_weight, bn_bias, running_mean, running_var):
    x = F.conv2d(x, conv_weight, None, stride=(1, 1), padding=(0, 0), dilation=(1, 1), groups=1)
    x = F.batch_norm(x, running_mean, running_var, bn_weight, bn_bias, training=False, momentum=0.1, eps=1e-05)
    return x
